title: Default Values feature is broken
excerpt:
Hello! I’m having a issue with the “pop-up window / frame” for inputing Default Values. 
When I use a board, then I stop, and choose another board, whenever I select the “Default Values” feature, the “pop-up window” show…

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello! I’m having a issue with the “pop-up window / frame” for inputing Default Values.

When I use a board, then I stop, and choose another board, whenever I select the “Default Values” feature, the “pop-up window” shown is for the last board opened, not the actual board.

It is like this for a month now, I guess… In the past it worked fine…

To complicate even further, the values does not save sometimes (if they are too many, I guess)…

Other times even if I save correctly, when I open again, some values are blank again…

Anyone have the same issue?

Thanks for reading! I’ll wait a solution…

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Jose,

Sorry to hear you’re encountering this odd behaviour!

Can I please ask that you test this in an incognito window (private browser)? It sounds like this could be a caching issue that we can resolve quickly - I look forward to hearing from you

posts.author: JoseDaher (Jose Daher)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! Thanks for the feedback. I was tackling this issues in many fronts, and the helpdesk answered with the same solution. I’ll try later.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: No problem - keep me updated if you require further help!
